ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 503, DEFENDANT KAISER GYPSUM COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANTS KAISER GYPSUM COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF PLAINTIFFS' CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS DENIED. DEFENDANT DID NOT SATISFY ITS BURDEN OF PRODUCTION THAT PLAINTIFFS DO NOT NOW HAVE AND CANNOT REASONABLY OBTAIN EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT ACTED WITH MALICE, FRAUD OR OPPRESSION. PLAINTIFFS' RESPONSES TO CONTENTION INTERROGATORIES PRECLUDE DEFENDANT FROM SUCCESSFULLY INVOKING THE FACTUALLY DEVOID PRONG OF AGUILAR. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON, MATTER NOT REPORTED

Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Marine Engineering And Supply Company
Off Calendar Jan-14-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Meeti S. Sudame, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, BARBAREA BARNES, as Wrongful Death Heir, and as Successor-in-Interest to VINCENT BARNES, Deceased, and RICHARD BARNES, as Legal Heir of VINCENT BARNES, Deceased ("plaintiffs").
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MARINE ENGINEERING AND SUPPLY COMPANY.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that the plaintiffs shall recover damages from defendant MARINE ENGINEERING AND SUPPLY COMPANY in the amount of $700,450.00 in Economic Damages, $1,500,000.00 in Non-Economic Damages, for a total amount of $2,200,450.00
The judgment shall take effect immediately.
The Clerk is ordered to enter the judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Nov-17-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Eric Sentlinger, Esq., of DEHAY ELLISTON LLP (510-285-0750), appearing for defendant / moving party Kaiser Gypsum Company, Inc.
Kimberly Chu, Esq., of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Barbara Barnes, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT KAISER GYPSUM COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendants Kaiser Gypsum Company, Inc.'s motion for summary adjudication of plaintiffs' claim for punitive damages is denied. Defendant did not satisfy its burden of production that plaintiffs do not now have and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that defendant acted with malice, fraud or oppression. Plaintiffs' responses to contention interrogatories preclude defendant from successfully invoking the factually devoid prong of Aguilar. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported = (503/TLJ)
